senses.definition_en: the ability to stay calm and accept delay, trouble, or suffering without becoming annoyed

examples.en: Teaching young children requires a great deal of patience.
examples.fa: آموزش به کودکان خردسال به صبر زیادی نیاز دارد.

examples.en: Please be patient; the results take time.
examples.fa: لطفاً صبور باشید؛ نتایج زمان می‌برند.

idioms.phrase: have the patience of a saint
idioms.example_en: You need the patience of a saint to deal with these customers.
idioms.example_fa: برای سروکار داشتن با این مشتری‌ها به صبر ایوب نیاز داری.

notes: Note the interesting double meaning of the related word "patient", which is both an adjective (صبور) and, unrelatedly in everyday use, a noun meaning "a person receiving medical care" (بیمار).
